name: init_sprites
comment: Clear OAM buffer and set initial sprite

name: mmc1_write_chr0
comment: Write 5-bit value to MMC1 CHR bank 0 ($A000-$BFFF)

name: mmc1_write_chr1
comment: Write 5-bit value to MMC1 CHR bank 1 ($C000-$DFFF)

name: mmc1_write_prg
comment: Write 5-bit value to MMC1 PRG bank ($E000-$FFFF)

name: wait_nmi
comment: Wait for NMI - JSR $F24A then set $1C flags

name: clear_game_state
comment: Clear zero page $20-$35 and RAM areas $0600-$07FF

name: sub_E898
comment: Called with A=0 during game loop

name: game_frame_proc
comment: Frame sync check - JSR $F743 then JMP wait_nmi

name: frame_check
comment: Check NMI flag and rendering state

name: dispatch_offset5
comment: Add 5 to dispatch index $3A then fall into dispatch

name: bank6_dispatch
comment: Bank-switch to bank 6 and call via jump table at $8000+$3A*2

name: dispatch_read_jmp
comment: Read ptr from $8000+Y and JMP through ($3E)

name: inline_dispatch
comment: Read dispatch params from inline data after JSR

name: indexed_jmp
comment: A=index into inline addr table following JSR then JMP

name: queue_sound
comment: Queue sound: A=ID ($FF=silence $00=nop else enqueue to $03E7). 84 call sites

name: nmi_ppu_update
comment: PPU VRAM update driven by $AD flags

name: chr_bank_table
comment: CHR bank pairs (chr0 chr1) indexed by $38*2

name: sub_E5B6
comment: Jump target from $EEEE when $AD bit 7 clear

name: nmi_bank0_tramp
comment: Switch to bank 0 JSR $8000 then restore

name: sound_main
comment: Sound engine main - save state process audio restore

name: play_sound
comment: Play sound effect from A register

name: game_jtable
comment: Main game dispatch jump table (32 entries)

name: mode_table
comment: Inline addr table for $19 dispatch (12 entries)

name: shared_text_advance
comment: Text advance loop (5-frame delay) shared by modes 7 8

name: check_game_active
comment: Check if game is active ($0601 entities)

name: setup_screen
comment: Setup screen layout from A parameter

name: dict_items
comment: Dictionary: items/terms (DRAGOON KASHIM ROSTAM CARPET etc)

name: data_bank_setup
comment: Setup CHR or PRG bank for data reads ($EA bit 5 selects)

name: set_chr_mode
comment: Store A to $38 (chr_bank_index) and set NMI flag bit 4

name: battle_screen_setup
comment: RPG battle screen init: sets $38=5 then lays out battle HUD

name: saved_chr_mode
comment: Saved chr_bank_index for UI engine restore

name: music_chr_save
comment: Saved chr_bank_index for music driver CHR restore

name: music_seq_tick
comment: Music sequencer tick: process 4 tone channels (Pulse1/2 Triangle DMC)

name: noise_seq_tick
comment: Noise channel sequencer tick: process noise SFX via $FA request

name: song_init
comment: Song init: load song header from $B005 table and set channel pointers

name: note_with_sweep
comment: Write APU sweep + period from $B189 lookup table

name: seq_loop_cmd
comment: Sequence command $01: advance pointer and re-enter channel loop

name: note_period_table
comment: Note period lookup table (40 entries pulse/triangle)

name: call_music_driver
comment: Switch to bank 2 and call $B000 music driver

name: sfx_data_table
comment: SFX data pointer table (indexed by $F8 value)

name: bank_trampoline
comment: Switch PRG to bank A then JSR $B000 then restore bank 0

name: noise_request
comment: Noise SFX request ID 1-18 (cleared after processing)

name: sfx_chan_request
comment: SFX channel setup request (cleared after processing)

name: ch_state_base
comment: Music channel state base: 4 channels x 4 bytes (ptr_lo ptr_hi duration last_period)
